title: thelypteris costata
intro: Thelypteris costata, also known as the giant leather fern or costate thelypteris, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris costata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, with the leaves also sometimes being used in poultices to treat skin irritations.
